name: Milky Way Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the Milky Way candy bars and butter in a double boiler.
2. Let the mixture cool completely.
3. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Cream the remaining butter with sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Alternately add buttermilk and flour, incorporating baking soda.
7. Stir in vanilla extract.
8. Gradually fold in the melted Milky Way candy bar mixture.
9. Pour the batter into a greased and floured bundt pan.
10. Bake for 1 hour, or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Allow the cake to cool for 15 minutes in the pan before turning it out onto a wire rack.
